title: Crypto Biz: Circle stock defies Wall Street and digital asset selloff
message_html: Crypto Biz: Circle stock defies Wall Street and digital asset selloff ...
snippet: The USDC issuer's stock is soaring despite a market selloff as stablecoins expand into traditional finance. Meanwhile, Canaan boosts BTC reserves and Wells Fargo eyes crypto services.
